steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The passage says the minaret is “almost always included” in mosque designs and is among the “standard features.” This signals we need a word for something typical and characteristic.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The word needs to mean a defining or characteristic feature, since the minaret is "almost always included" as one of the "standard features" of mosque design. Substitute each choice:
  • "hallmark": a distinctive, identifying feature — matches perfectly; the minaret is a reliable, recognized marker of mosque architecture. ✓
  • "rejection": the act of refusing or dismissing — the passage says minarets are included, not refused; this is the opposite of what is described. ✗
  • "motivation": a reason or driving force behind an action — the minaret is a physical feature, not a reason why mosques are built. ✗
  • "duplicate": an exact copy of something else — the minaret is an original feature, not a copy of another structure. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
